economic_notes: Band earns royalties from fish farming, mineral extraction, power production and rentals through enterprise activities. Kwakiutl Nation Development Corporation (GBE) reported revenues of $1,980,634 and net income of $880,602. Band holds one-third equity interest in Gilakas'la Kwa Holdings Ltd. (nominal value). Ministerial Loan Guarantees for housing loans totaling $528,011 outstanding.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 but audit report is dated January 24, 2024 — significant delay in audit completion. One controlled subsidiary fully consolidated: 0819357 B.C. Ltd. One GBE accounted for on modified equity basis: Kwakiutl Nation Development Corporation (100% owned). No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($3,094,672) + Provincial ($1,326,246) + CMHC ($113,190) + Fisheries and Oceans Canada ($224,934) + First Nation Health Authority ($1,153,080) + NVIATS ($122,072) + FNESC ($380302) = $6,414,496; however segment disclosure shows Federal non-ISC of $1,761,662 and Provincial of $1,748,948 recognized (vs. cash received basis on income statement). Used income statement figures for revenue lines. expenses_salaries_total of $2,945,528 from segment disclosure includes salaries and benefits; Schedule of Expenses by Object shows Salaries and Wages of $2,865,229 separately. Honoraria of $221,534 also noted in expenses by object.
